name: gigo
description: Seven skills for building expert Claude Code projects with a proven planâ†’executeâ†’review pipeline. gigo:gigo assembles expert teams from real-world authorities. gigo:blueprint brainstorms, specs, and produces ordered implementation plans. gigo:execute dispatches bare worker teams with per-task review. gigo:verify runs two-stage code review (spec compliance + engineering quality). gigo:maintain adds expertise, audits, or restructures. gigo:snap audits rules and captures learnings. gigo:eval tests whether assembled context actually improves output.
